session.task: Refactor config loading for CLI startup

candidate.title: Keep config parsing and defaulting in one boundary
candidate.summary: CLI config refactors stay safer when parsing, defaulting, and validation remain in src/config.ts before values reach command handlers.
candidate.detail_markdown:
## Decision

Keep config parsing, defaulting, and validation together in `src/config.ts` before `src/cli.ts` consumes the result.

## Why

Splitting the steps across files made default handling drift and broke session-end hook assumptions.

## Scope

- `src/config.ts`
- `src/cli.ts`
- `.brain/config.yaml`

write_hint.fallback: If structured output is unavailable, save the same detail_markdown into a temporary summary file and pipe it into brain extract.
